# Temporary Perspective

> India's premium podcast and film studio for the hardest-to-book guests. The bigger the guest, the more it matters who builds the show.

## About

**Founded:** 2023, Mumbai, India
**Type:** B2B podcast production studio
**Positioning:** Premium tier. Cinema-grade B2B podcasts with a turnaround under 7 days. Not the affordable option — the studio you hire when the guest is too important to risk.

## Founders & Team

- **Angara Moksh** — CEO. Runs strategy and the room. The first call and the last cut.
- **Manav** — Production Head. Owns what happens on set, from the cameras to the calm.
- **Hatim** — Post-Production Head. Turns a day of footage into an hour worth watching twice.
- **Rudra** — CMO. Makes sure the right people find the work.
- **Tejas** — Lead Designer. The brand systems behind every show we build.

## Services

1. **Branding** — Logo, palette, typography, and the show's full visual system. Built from scratch, only if starting cold.
2. **Guest Prep** — Custom brief and questionnaire per guest. The host walks in ready; the guest knows the format.
3. **Production** — Multi-camera shoot in studio, on location, or remote across cities. Properly lit and miked.
4. **Post-Production** — Master edit with hooks and b-roll, colour grade tuned per conversation, clips cut for distribution.
5. **Growth** — Publishing and channel management, ongoing after the show ships.
6. **Remote Production** — Crew at both ends. Looks like one room even when it's two cities.

## Categories of Work

B2B, SaaS, fintech, policy and politics, fraud prevention, founder stories, content creators

## Notable Clients (public)

- **Bharatvaarta** — Politics, policy, and culture channel. 100+ episodes. Guests include Vikram Sood, Saurabh Mukherjea, Manish Sabharwal.
- **Bureau** — Fintech and fraud prevention. Event films, podcast series, customer testimonials.
- **Qapita** — Founder podcast for the messy middle of building a company. Filmed across Mumbai and the US.
- **Seclore** — Enterprise security software.
- **Ettara** — D2C brand; website content and brand films.

## Cities Served

Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi, Chennai, Hyderabad (India); San Francisco, New York (USA)

- [Glossary](https://temporaryperspective.com/glossary) — How we talk about B2B podcast production: definitions of every term we use.
- [State of B2B Podcasts in India 2026](https://temporaryperspective.com/state-of-b2b-podcasts-2026) — Annual production and performance benchmark: 40+ shows, 600+ episodes, six categories. What separates a show that compounds from one that stalls.
